title: Add further simulation formats and expand multi-select content

acceptance_criteria.text: Add at least one additional CompTIA-style simulation format beyond multi-select MCQ (candidates: categorization/drag-to-bucket, fill-in / CLI command entry, hotspot/diagram click) end-to-end: type, grading, Practice + Mock rendering, validators, and tests.
evidence: Added fill-in PBQ support end-to-end: src/types.ts model, src/logic.ts normalized grading, src/App.tsx Practice/Mock rendering, src/styles.css UI states, src/content/validate.ts and scripts/validate-content.mjs validation.
Added one fill-in PBQ per available track: aplus-p09, netplus-p009, secplus-p009.
Tests: src/logic.test.ts covers normalized fill-in grading; src/content/validate.test.ts covers valid and invalid fill-in PBQ structures.

acceptance_criteria.text: Grow multi-select MCQ coverage beyond the item 210 seed set toward a target density per domain/objective, keeping the content bank valid.
evidence: Expanded multi-select MCQ coverage from the item 210 seed set by adding aplus-q391/aplus-q392, netplus-q180/netplus-q181, and secplus-q198/secplus-q199.
npm run validate:content confirms 770 questions and all objective coverage targets remain satisfied.

source: Follow-up split from work item 210 (scope decision 2026-06-20)
